n: Book 5, Chapter 3: Older Than the Hills

steps.t: Khôr-buri-Ghân is in the Drúadan Forest. He has introduced himself as the son of the chief of the Wild Men, and wants to know who you are and what bri…

Khôr-buri-Ghân is in the Drúadan Forest. He has introduced himself as the son of the chief of the Wild Men, and wants to know what you are seeking and…
Khôr-buri-Ghân gave you directions to Drû Bhûta, the village of the Wild Men. He said: 'Drû Bhûta village to west. Must go north-west through rocks, a…
Khôr-buri-Ghân is waiting to welcome you to the village of Drû Bhûta.
Khôr-buri-Ghân's fellow Wild Men can be found throughout their village of Drû Bhûta.
Khôr-buri-Ghân is at the entrance to Drû Bhûta.
Ghân-buri-Ghân, the leader of the Wild Men, can be found in the village of Drû Bhûta.
